feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Generating E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario
entry.content:
I have Scenario, Sold to party and Bill to party is from Hyderabad(A), Ship to party is in Maharashtra (B) And Plant is in Maharashtra (C). So invoice generated with IGST. But from GST side we are getting error as, 'For the Intra state transaction, IGST amount is not applicable; only CGST and SGST amount are applicable for the document.

So, I think it is the case of E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario. Where  C create Invoice against the A, and A create Invoice against the B. So, How it is to be adopted in SAP. Also, help me if I am taking wrong understanding.

entry.title: No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type ZNWO
entry.content:
No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type xxxx

Message No. VL455

Sale order created from va01

Delivery creation error.

entry.title: Promotion number not appear in VBKD
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

In  the sales order  the number of promotion field "WAKTION "  is empty in table VBKD 

In conditions record of the sales order the promotion is determined KONP-AKTNR ok ( and we can display the promotion in tcode WAK3 )

in the customizing  path logistics-general -Retail promotion -promotion determination in sales order- determination for sales area  is checked 

Is there any configuration missing to fill   VBKD -WAKtion field ? please advice 

Thank you

entry.title: Settlement calculation on the basis of Business volume customer for Single Payee contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a scenario where the condition contract is created for a different customer (A) in the header (to settle the accruals against) single payee, and a different customer (B) in the Business Volume table (to post the accruals against). When we check the line items for the accruals from billing documents, the line item is recorded against B, which is correct as this is the customer from the BV table and we also maintained the condition record for the customer (B). However, when the delta accruals are posted or settlement documents are posted, the system is not able to derive the customer from the business volume table, and hence the condition record is not determining for customer (B). Instead, customer (A) is determining, and for customer (A), there is no record in the system, resulting in the documents being created with zero value.

Is there a configuration setting to adjust this so that customer (B) will determine and find the condition record?

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Create new entries in document classes in Sap S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

When configuring the document classes, it does not allow entering new entries, only the default ones can be used. Is there a way to activate the new entries button?

Regards,

entry.title: Output should be processed when Invoice is approved in ZATCA (edoc_cockpit)
entry.content:
Hi All

The client requirement is system should process ALE output ( medium-A) after invoice is approved in EDOC-COCKPIT portal in SA.

Business use VF31 to process these outputs.

After creating the invoice in VF01/Vf04 it will be sent to EDOC_COKPIT portal shown below and the requirement is ZRD output type should be processed only when the Billing document is approved in EDOC_COKPIT.

I was thinking to develop a VOFM output routine based on above conditions and assigned that to ZRD output type in Output procedure so system will check the Billing doc status in EDOC-COCKPIT and if not approved it should not be determined the ZRD in billing document.

But I see the above solution may not work as after creating the billing doc it is sent to EDOC-COCKPIT after some time someone manfully approved it. So in this case there is a time gap.

What i am thinking we need to write a code in VF31 program where system should consider those invoices which are approved in EDOC-COKCPIT into VF31 list?

Tanks in advance

entry.title: Mass updates of New Tax Category (condition type_
entry.content:
Dear,

We are working ON S/4 HANA conversion project. now we are doing post conversion activities on S/4 HANA.

when we synchronized customer to BP on ECC, that time TAX category (Tax condition type) was CNXJ. 

now on S/4 we have created new TAX category UTXJ, when we opened BP for existing customer in display mode we don't see this UTXJ in billing tab of sales area (FLCU01) but when we clicked on Change mode, we can see new tax category.

Is this expected behavior of system? what should be do to see see new tax category in display mode only without going to change mode.?

Thank you

entry.title: Error in price calculation in outbound delivery due to field KOMK-KUNNR
entry.content:
Dear experts,

in my outbound delivery I use a pricing condition (for freight costs) with an access sequence, that uses the sold-to customer number (see screenshot, so far nothing special...), but during outbound delivery processing KOMK-KUNNR will have different values depending on delivery creation or delivery change. Therefore it's obligatory to have at least one partner role that deviates from the sold-to party, e.g. the goods receiver is not the same as sold-to.

This miscalculation of the customer number leads to wrong results in pricing...

From an abap point of view the logic for filling komk-kunnr is in the program SAPFV50P, in include FV50PF0P_P_KOMK_KOMP_FUELLEN in form routine P_KOMK_KOMP_FUELLEN.

Here komk-kunnr is filled from kuagv-kunnr, which is prefilled with the correct value during document creation (VL01N). During document change (VL02N) it gets determined in routine auftraggeber_bereitstellen, which therefore uses an old internal table with headerline called xvbpa[].

Up to S/4HANA 2021 this was fine, because they used a loop ... where parvw = parvw_ag, but in S/4 2022 and higher they replaced the loop with new abap-objects stuff, but they forgot about remainig data in the header line of xvbpa...

Can someone confirm this faulty behaviour in their S/4HANA system?

Best regards,

Mark

entry.title: Output Not Processed VF01
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a invoice through VF01 , Output is determined but status showing NOT PROCESSED

I checked the determin.analsis . It was showing success.

Please guide.

entry.title: Open items check at settelment document creation
entry.content: We have a business requirement: when running settlement for condition contracts, the system should check customer open items. If there are any due invoices, the system should not allow the creation of the settlement document.

entry.title: What is rappel and what could be used instead?
entry.content:
Hello, everyone.

I'm a manufacturing consultant (PP/QM), but just joined a new project and have been working as a logistics consultant.

I'd kindly like to ask what is Rappel, where and how it is used, and if are there any alternative processes to it in SAP.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: The default date is not copied into existing schedule lines V1013
entry.content:
Hi,

I have 2 sales orders, they have different shipping points and routes.

After changing Schedule date earlier, I can change Requested delivery date on header level in one SO, while cannot do that in another SO, the system says, "The default date is not copied into existing schedule lines V1013", what is the reason? and how to solve this issue?

#ECC

entry.title: S/4 HANA 2023 Create Sales Order App - no serial number and no internal order
entry.content:
We are in S/4 HANA 2023 with Fiori, and taking a review of GUI vs Fiori App. We find that in the "sales order" apps that it is missing the serial number entry and the ability to enter an internal order.

Doing a direct entry into GUI is successful, we can enter the serial number and enter the internal order number.

Has anyone tried the same analysis, what was your result, did you need to do an enhancement or stick to the GUI App in Fiori?

Regards

Waza

entry.title: SD Incompletion Log for tab Additional Data C
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

in transaction VA01/VA02/VA03 we have a tab "Additional Data C" in the header section. 

Now when there is an incompletion log entry poiting to an error in this tab, there is no entry in the SPRO - Customization Table for "additional header C":

When the user now clicks on this message in the incompletion log, the system does not know where to jump to and an error message is shown.

How can we either

- define a screen that can be used in this SPRO-Table

- or is there maybe an SAP-Note that handels that issue.

 

Thank you and cheers

 

Andy

entry.title: Transaction IDCNAR - Credit limit field empty
entry.content:
Hello, 

when i run the IDCNAR transaction on a production environment, i have the credit limit field empty while on the quality environment this field is filled.

can you please tell me this is due to what ?

Thank you

entry.title: How to achieve the below accounting entry during F-29 Customer downpayment via SD route
entry.content:
Hi All,

We implemented the customer Downpayment via SD route through billing plan

my Sales order

step1. VA01-Sales order with billing plan step2. Vf01-FAZ (downpayment req) step3. F-29- post downpayment with ref to SD downpayment request, Step 4. VL01N, PGI, Step5. VF01(final invoice). Everything looks fine it is similar like below blog for reference i copied. My values are different, but process is same as blog mentioned. How to understand the FI postings made in SD down ... - SAP Community

my accountant entry as below during F-29

SD final invoice a/c entry

so far it looks fine the process and accounting entry similar like blog mentioned. However, as per ZATCA requirement client is insisting on the below accounting entry during F-29

 

How to achieve the above expected acc entry during F-29, what is the setting need to change.

Other Information:

While posting the F-29 with ref FI cust down payment request (created via F-37) the above expected ac entry is coming. However, when F-29 is created with ref to SD down payment request created via VF01( type FAZ) it is different. Like shown above. 

Please let me know if you need any more details.

Thanks!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Everything looks fine

entry.title: Ship.condition 02 loading grp 0003 plant MMC1 StLoc MTL not defined
entry.content:
I have been struggling with this error for the lst 2 days. Can anyone help with the steps and the T-Code.

Thanks

entry.title: Need to send the Customer Advance invoice to EDOC_COCKPIT) ZATCA portal
entry.content:
Hi All 

We implemented Customer advance payment via SD route for Saudi Arabia client. Here are the process steps.

VA01- With billing plan- we maintain advance here 

 

VF01- FAZ - down payment request with ref to Order

F-29- Post the downpayment

VL01N: Outbound delivery and PGI

VF01- SD final invoice: This SD invoice is already sending to EDOC_COCKPIT

Here everything looks fine. Only challenge is how to send the customer advance invoice to EDOC_COCKPIT. The F-29 which we received is the payment, not an invoice.

Here trying to understand if any one of you implemented for Saudi Arabia what approach was followed to send the customer advance invoice to ZATCA portal.

Tried to find it in Google but did not find the suitable document. Please let me know if you need any further details.

thanks

entry.title: Historical reporting on sales order incompletion log
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Do you know of a way to report on those sales orders that have had an incompletion log?

My problem is that, once resolved, the orders will logically not show anymore in transactions like V.02 but I then also lost the possibility to be able to report on such errors and drive corrective actions. I'm considering to setup an automatic output of the v.02 report at intervals which then needs to get consolidated (more an Excel task) for each dy of the month to get a lookback possibillity. But I wonder if there's a better way? 

Many thanks

Mike

entry.title: Enhancement for invoice to invoice correction request (invoice to order).
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement as below:

When an invoice correction request is created with reference to an invoice, particular condition type should be re-determined. Since the standard pricing type for invoice to invoice correction request is "E - Copy price elements and fix values" for credit item (invoice correction req - sales doc type is K), even if a condition record is deleted, it is still being copied from reference invoice to invoice correction.

Where can we put an enhancement (any exits or copy control routines) for re-determining a condition type from invoice to invoice correction request?
